channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: It’s been 6 weeks now since… I decided to do my own house founda...
item.description:
Full post Embed


It’s been 6 weeks now since… I decided to do my own house foundations 🏠 As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. ⚒️ However with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. 🤷‍♀️ But wow it’s been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming ⌛️ This is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasn’t until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more ‘do-able’ 🚜 The majority of the six weeks that I’ve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. 🙋 What’s your opinion? ⬇️ Do you think it’s worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though it’s taking 2-3x the amount of time? 🤷‍♀️
#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy

item.title: 🛠️🏠How I started my container home build journey 🏠🛠️ The vision ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


🛠️🏠How I started my container home build journey 🏠🛠️ The vision wasn’t always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.💪 Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. 🧍 I believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we don’t see reality as it is, we see it as we are 👀 This is your life, your reality and the key word here is ‘you’! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? ✨🫶
#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream

item.title: Even when I’m in a losing battle to a log I somehow don’t know h...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Even when I’m in a losing battle to a log I somehow don’t know how to give up 😂🤦‍♀️ For context I get asked quite regularly if I ever feel like giving up and it literally has never crossed my mind and then I found this clip and thought it was the perfect example 😂

item.title: The ball is well and truly rolling now! Now let’s all cross our ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


The ball is well and truly rolling now! Now let’s all cross our fingers that the timber dries quicker with summer on the way 🤞😬 But great news about the Jarrah that means soon I can start turning the slabs into decking boards 😍

item.title: There’s so many more steps to come to reinforce this container (...
item.description:
Full post Embed


There’s so many more steps to come to reinforce this container (including but not only closed cell spray foam and the beautiful timber posts I milled myself from my property 😍) That it’ll be able to withstand any natural disaster when I’m done (knock on bloody wood, although I only need to worry about fires 🔥😝)

item.title: Hands up if you also wanted to see the container wall panel drop...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Hands up if you also wanted to see the container wall panel drop from the second story? 🤭🙋‍♀️ This house is now a third of the way opened up, I’m still waiting on my casements and frames that are getting double glazed glass installed and I still have my doors to do (which by the way HUGE!) 😍

item.title: I’m so stoked I still have many more windows and doors to instal...
item.description:
Full post Embed


I’m so stoked I still have many more windows and doors to install because this is easily the most fun I’ve had on the build so far! 😝

item.title: The second story of my container house has entered the chat 🤭
item.description:
Full post Embed


The second story of my container house has entered the chat 🤭

item.title: At this point in my life nothing feels as good as kicking out st...
item.description:
Full post Embed


At this point in my life nothing feels as good as kicking out steel does , let’s get this show on the road 😝

item.title: Just kicking down all the walls over here 🙋‍♀️
item.description:
Full post Embed


Just kicking down all the walls over here 🙋‍♀️

item.title: If you ever happen to be building a container house now you know...
item.description:
Full post Embed


If you ever happen to be building a container house now you know how to make steel angle frames for the windows 😝🥰
